---
name: Config contribution proposal
about: Propose authoring a reference template (Tier 2) or original in-app creation (Tier 3)
labels: ['config', 'discussion']
---

## Tier

- [ ] **Tier 2** — Reference content (paid bounty, no royalty). Includes new countries, new industries, new worlds, system seeds.
- [ ] **Tier 3** — Original in-app creation (royalty-bearing, capped at 0.5%, requires CLA + KYC). Restricted to: institutions, characters, smart-contract templates within an existing country and industry.

     Tier 3 character: identity, personality, cognition pinning, professions,
     soft-skill profile, vital_status.
     Tier 3 smart contract: contract type, factory deployment, audit posture. -->

## Estimated effort + timeline

<!-- Hours of work; calendar window. -->

## Tier 3 only — pre-conditions

<!-- For royalty-bearing creations: -->

- [ ] I'm prepared to sign the Tier 3 CLA before review begins
- [ ] I've completed KYC Tier 2 verification (or will before submission)
- [ ] My institution / character / smart-contract is scoped within an existing country and industry — I'm not proposing a new country or industry under this Tier 3 issue (those are Tier 2)
- [ ] For institutions: I can meet the institution-type's `min_capital_pol` requirement set by the parent industry config
- [ ] For smart contracts: I understand factory-approval review is required before mainnet deployment
- [ ] My creation will run only on Polis (license-to-host grant)
